text: As I stand at the threshold of this glass-walled room filled with focused people and the soft buzz of conversation, I am struck by a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. Peering through the transparent barrier between the inner world of ideas and outer corridor, I feel both apart and on the verge of participation. Entering the R+D space, surrounded by vibrant displays and philosophical text, I am enveloped by a spirit of inquiry. Here, the collective striving for knowledge makes me ponder my place among these minds—part observer, part participant—wondering what advances or revelations await just beyond the next line of inquiry.
